productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid White Polo  Tshirt
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 96% cotton and 4% elastane, has a polo neck with a black and red striped collar, short sleeves with a black stripe and ribbed cuffs, chest button placket, embroidered and appliqued branding on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with similar colours Tumble dry low Medium iron; do not iron on decorations Radiate charm and style in this trendy T-shirt from US Polo. The stripes and the vibrant colours are an eye-catcher, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or layer it under a cardigan for instant throw-on-and-go style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6', shoulders 18"
